capture_note: Captured from real Next.js dashboard routes in capture mode with a visible Demo data — sample environment label. The deterministic Playwright harness uses unmistakably fictional DEMO-VULN identifiers and synthetic risk signals. These records demonstrate UI states only; they are not advisory, EPSS, KEV, or buyer-environment evidence.
